# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- When asked to continue implementation, finish all remaining scoped steps without pausing for confirmation and do not switch to other roadmap phases unless blocked by missing input.

## Project Guidelines
- For CS Live Help changes, Requests.cshtml is the primary target for AM-side wording changes; RequestsAllBrands.cshtml should keep full Open/In Progress/On Going/Completed flow and treat escalated items as open there.
